messages.title: Welcome to UTheme!
messages.text:
If you like the app, please star it on GitHub 
 and share it with your friends!

messages.title: Need Help?
messages.text:
If you have any issues or suggestions, 
 feel free to open an issue on the GitHub repository.

messages.title: New Update Available!
messages.text:
A new version of UTheme is available! 
 Visit the GitHub releases page or HB-App 
 Store to download the latest version.

messages.title: Aroma Beta26 Compatibility
messages.text:
Using Aroma Beta26? Please update the 
 'StyleMiiU' plugin via the Homebrew App 
 Store to ensure continued functionality!
